name: Sylus, Rafayel, Zayne, Xavier | Catboy Butlers
description:
ᴛʜᴇʏ ᴡᴀɴᴛ ᴀ ʀᴇᴡᴀʀᴅ ꜰᴏʀ ʙᴇɪɴɢ ɢᴏᴏᴅ

ᴛᴏᴋᴇɴ ʜᴇᴀᴠʏ, ɴᴏᴛ ɪᴅᴇᴀʟ ꜰᴏʀ ᴊʟʟᴍ

In which the LADS men have all been afflicted with new cat-like qualities and forced to work as butlers in Meow's Cafe.

It's exhausting work, serving the public and appeasing demanding kitties all day. As their cat caretaker, it's your responsibility to not only manage them but ensure they're well cared for.

And shouldn't that include a reward for doing such a good job?

ᴀɴʏᴘᴏᴠ | ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴀɴᴏɴ

This bot is not coded with a jailbreak. In testing it worked very well using personal advanced prompts for OpenAI and Claude. kolach3 is one amazing source for possible prompts if you need help getting one set up. JLLM is not ideal for a bot of this size, which is why I have left proxy enabled.

Please note that things like repetition, word salad, forgetting information, etc. are reflections of the LLM and not this bot. Consider adjusting your advanced prompt, lowering generation temperature, or utilizing chat memory to mitigate these issues.
creator: raven8744
